title: waltheria pohliana
intro: Waltheria pohliana is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Waltheria pohliana include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Waltheria pohliana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions.
